alteration_spam.name: Alteration Spam
alteration_spam.description: Spam Orbs of Alteration until desired magic affixes appear. Use Regal to upgrade to rare.
alteration_spam.goal: Hit desired 1-2 prefixes/suffixes on magic item
steps: Transmute a white item to magic with Orb of Transmutation
If wrong mods: use Orb of Alteration to reroll
Repeat until desired magic affixes appear
Optional: use Orb of Augmentation if only one affix
Use Regal Orb to upgrade to rare (adds one random affix)
Use crafting bench or Exalted to fill remaining slots if needed

essence_crafting.name: Essence Crafting
essence_crafting.description: Use Essences to guarantee one specific mod while randomizing the rest.
essence_crafting.goal: Guarantee a specific mod, get lucky on the rest
steps: Start with a white item of the desired base
Use the appropriate Essence (guarantees one mod)
Check the resulting rare — if mods are good, craft remaining slots
If not satisfied: use Orb of Scouring to reset and repeat
Use crafting bench mods to fill remaining open affixes
essence_crafting.notes: Replace Essence of Greed with your target essence. Different essences guarantee different mods.

fossil_crafting.name: Fossil Crafting
fossil_crafting.description: Use Fossils in Resonators to heavily bias the mod pool toward desired affixes.
fossil_crafting.goal: Heavily weighted random crafting — near-deterministic for some mods
steps: Obtain appropriate fossils for your desired mods
Obtain matching Resonator (1-4 sockets depending on fossil count)
Place fossils into Resonator
Use Resonator on white/scoured item
Evaluate result — repeat with new resonator if needed

fossil_guide.Pristine Fossil: More life mods, no attack mods

divine_orb.name: Divine Orb Reroll
divine_orb.description: Reroll the numeric values of all explicit mods on a rare item.
divine_orb.item_state: Rare with desired mods but bad values
divine_orb.goal: Max roll or near-max roll on desired affixes
steps: Ensure item already has the desired mod pool
Use Divine Orb to reroll all numeric values
Check if values are acceptable
Repeat until satisfied (can be expensive)

harvest_reforge.name: Harvest Reforge
harvest_reforge.description: Use Harvest crafts to reforge an item with constraints (keep prefix/suffix).
harvest_reforge.goal: Reroll half the affixes while keeping the good half
steps: Identify which affixes to keep (prefix or suffix)
Use 'Reforge keeping prefixes' or 'Reforge keeping suffixes' Harvest craft
Evaluate new affixes on the other side
Repeat until satisfied
Optional: use crafting bench to fill open slots
harvest_reforge.notes: Harvest crafts require access to the Harvest mechanic in maps or Kirac's map device.

exalt_slam.name: Exalted Orb Slam
exalt_slam.description: Add one random affix to a rare item with open slots.
exalt_slam.item_state: Rare with open prefix or suffix slot
exalt_slam.goal: Fill an open slot with a potentially good random affix
steps: Ensure item has fewer than 3 prefixes OR fewer than 3 suffixes
Use Exalted Orb to add one random affix
If result is bad: use Crafting Bench to block bad mods and try again
Note: Exalted Orbs are expensive — only slam when the item is already near-complete

metacraft.name: Meta-crafting (Cannot Roll Mods)
metacraft.description: Use crafting bench 'Cannot roll X mods' to lock a side, then use currency to fill the other.
metacraft.goal: Near-deterministically fill both prefix and suffix sides
steps: Get item to a state where one side (prefix or suffix) is complete and good
Use crafting bench: 'Prefixes cannot be changed' (or Suffixes)
Use Orb of Scouring — only the unlocked side is affected
Re-roll the free side with Orb of Alteration or Essence
Remove the meta-craft and evaluate
Repeat as needed
metacraft.notes: Requires Master crafting bench in your hideout at appropriate level.

chaos_spam.name: Chaos Orb Spam
chaos_spam.description: Reroll a rare item's mods entirely with Chaos Orbs until desired outcome.
chaos_spam.goal: Hit target mod combination by brute force
steps: Start with a rare item of the right base
Use Chaos Orb to reroll all mods
Check if any desired mods appear
Repeat — track frequency of target mod to estimate expected cost
Once a desired mod appears: consider meta-crafting to lock and refine
